case_title: JENNIFER F. HARRELL VS. GATELINX CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRELL, JENNIFER F. AS TO DEFENDANT GATELINX CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRELL, JENNIFER F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GATELINX CORPORATION $33,612.52 PRINCIPAL, $341.11 INTEREST, $295.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,249.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
